amends.amended_provision: retires amendment checker_labeling_model_proposed_owner_verified_2026-07-20 UNEXECUTED (zero owner labels were produced under it) and reinstates amendment checker_labeling_two_labeler_split_2026-07-19 as the operative labeling procedure

anchoring_exposure_disclosure.handling: recorded here for the oracle's post-hoc review; the sealed proposal rejudge/phase2_checker_claude_labels_2026-07-20.json and the verification tool rejudge/checker_verification_jack_2026-07-20.html remain in the repository append-only but are QUARANTINED: neither labeler may open either file until both human label exports are complete, after which the sealed proposal may be used post-hoc as a model-vs-human comparison

oracle_review: Codex post-hoc review (on/after 2026-07-24) still covers the amendment-2 split design per that amendment's own terms; amendment 3 no longer requires review as an approval basis since it was retired unexecuted, but this retirement record and the residual-exposure disclosure are included in the review packet
note: Append-only amendment; no prior artifact is rewritten or deleted.
